history.content:
<thought>
The goal (G) is at row 05 column F, which is two cells ahead from my current position if I face east. I can see the cell directly in front is floor (.), but first I need to orient toward column F (east). I’m currently facing north (the ^ indicates front toward row 06). I will turn right to face east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal G at row 05 column B. My current position is at row 07 column D (marked by ^), facing north. The cell in front (row 06 column D) is floor '.', so I should move forward to reduce the distance to the goal and avoid lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
Now I am at row 07 column D facing north. The goal is at row 06 column B, which is two cells north and two cells west from me. That suggests I should turn left (west) to approach column B. The cell to the west (row 07 column C) is lava 'L', so I must avoid moving west at row 07. However, turning left first is safe; then I can move forward if the front cell after turning is not lava. I will turn left to face west.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m at row 07 column D facing west (left). From the view, the goal G is at row 05 column E. The cell directly in front (row 07 column C) is floor '.', so I can move forward safely to continue progressing toward the goal while avoiding the lava at row 06 column C.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
